title: UPPSC Medical Officer and Other Post Online Form 2026
post_name: UPPSC Medical Officer, Dental Surgeon, Swastha Shiksha Adhikari, Veterinary Officer & Other Post Direct Recruitment 2025 Apply Online for 2158 Post
fee_payment_method: Pay the Exam Fee Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking or UPI Fee Mode Only.
age_relaxation_notes: UPPSC Direct Recruitment D-6/E-1/2025 Age Relaxation Extra for Details Must Read the Notification.
how_to_apply: Uttar Pradesh Public Service Commission UPPSC Medical Officer & Other Various Post Direct Recruitment 2025. Notification and Invited Online Application Form for the Latest UPPSC Jobs 2025 Candidate Can Apply Online for 22 December 2025 to 22 January 2026.
Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the UPPSC Latest Recruitment 2025 Application Form in Sarkari Result Latest Job Section.
Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Hand Writing, Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details.
Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID, Thumb, Proof, Etc.
Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully.
If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed.
Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form
